pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler source and target from Java 8 to Java 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Codebase likely uses Java 21 features (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) or dependencies that require Java 21; compiling with Java 8 settings would cause compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.4.1, which requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x is incompatible with Java 8 and requires Jakarta EE 9+ (javax.* -> jakarta.*); using older Spring Boot versions or Java 8 would cause classpath conflicts and compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Guava dependency, likely replaced by standard Java libraries or other utilities in the modernized codebase.
Upgrade AssertJ to version 3.27.3 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x BOM.
Remove Vavr test dependency, likely no longer used in the modernized test suite.
Remove JUnit 4 dependency, likely migrated to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) managed by Spring Boot 3.x BOM.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 to support Java 21 compilation features.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.5.2 to ensure proper test execution on Java 21.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the Maven Versions Plugin backup file to .gitignore to prevent committing generated backup files.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper configuration to use a newer wrapper version and Maven distribution compatible with modern JDKs.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper script with the modern version 3.3.4 to support native Maven Daemon (mvnd) and improved download mechanisms.
mvnw.after: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper batch script with the modern version 3.3.4 implementation that uses PowerShell for distribution download and management.
mvnw.cmd.after: @REM Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4
